sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ المُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الفِطْرِ بَعْدَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَلْبَسُ الأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَذْهَبُونَ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače novu odjeću i idu na molitvu.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and go to prayer.

sentences.arabic: تُقَدِّمُ العَائِلَاتُ الحَلْوِيَّاتِ مِثْلَ المَعْمُولِ لِلزُّوَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice poslužuju posjetiocima slatkiše poput ma'mula.
sentences.translationEn: Families serve sweets like ma'amoul to visitors.

sentences.translation: Ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke i govore "Bajram barećula".
sentences.translationEn: People exchange greetings and say "Eid Mubarak".

sentences.arabic: يَعُمُّ الفَرَحُ وَالسُّرُورُ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ وَالبُيُوتِ.
sentences.translation: Radost i veselje se šire ulicama i kućama.
sentences.translationEn: Joy and happiness spread throughout the streets and homes.
